mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls signal labor market strength, which increases expectations of future growth and inflation, leading to higher 10-year Treasury yields over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward yield change is negative in more than 60% of instances when PAYEMS increases month-over-month on a rolling 3-year basis, reject.

mechanism_narrative: When the Consumer Price Index year-over-year inflation rate exceeds 2.5%, it signals overheating, prompting markets to demand higher term premiums, which pushes 10-year yields up over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the average 20-day forward yield change is non-positive in all instances where the trigger condition holds over a 5-year window, reject.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of a low federal funds rate and high consumer price inflation produces a negative real interest rate, which signals accommodative monetary policy relative to inflation, leading to higher 10-year Treasury yields over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the rank correlation between the real rate (FEDFUNDS minus CPIAUCSL annual inflation) and the forward 20-day yield change is weakly negative (above -0.1) over any 3-year period, reject.

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle when the federal funds rate is above 3%, further increases in the rate signal the Fed's commitment to controlling inflation, which reduces long-term inflation expectations and lowers 10-year Treasury yields over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward yield change is positive in more than half of the instances when FEDFUNDS rises during a period when FEDFUNDS > 3%, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales indicate robust consumer spending, which strengthens economic growth expectations and pushes 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If the average 5-day forward yield change is negative in months where RSAFS increases month-over-month over a 10-year period, reject.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth exceeds 0.5% month-over-month, it signals a strengthening manufacturing sector, raising economic activity expectations and driving 10-year yields higher over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 60-day forward yield change is negative in more than 40% of instances when the trigger condition holds over any 5-year window, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously rising nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rate indicate a very tight labor market, which increases wage inflation expectations and pushes 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward yield change is negative in more than half of the months when both PAYEMS increases and UNRATE decreases simultaneously over any 3-year window, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts combined with a low federal funds rate signal strong demand supported by accommodative monetary policy, boosting growth expectations and pushing 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 60-day forward yield change is negative in more than 40% of instances where HOUST increases and FEDFUNDS is below 2% over any 5-year window, reject.
